name: Moriroku Holdings Company, Ltd.
summary: Moriroku Holdings Company, Ltd. develops, manufactures, and distributes resin-moulded components for 4-wheeled and 2-wheeled vehicles and high-performance components in Japan. Its products include exterior and interior parts, as well as precision machinery and electric tool components. The company also manufactures, distributes, imports and exports, and sells chemical and synthetic resin products, such as films/sheets, oil absorbents, bonding agents, LED materials, heat dissipation materials, damping coats, and semiconductor process materials, as well as raw materials for coatings and adhesives, friction materials, pharmaceutical and agricultural intermediates, and cosmetics. In addition, it imports, exports, and sells electronic materials, composite materials, industrial materials, foods, etc. The company was formerly known as Moriroku Company Ltd. and changed its name to Moriroku Holdings Company, Ltd. in 2008. Moriroku Holdings Company, Ltd. was founded in 1663 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
